description: skill-concierge — SKILL-FIRST doctrine + semantic enforcer + invocation ledger + index self-heal. SessionStart: inject the full standing-order doctrine (doctrine.py, read from hooks/doctrine/skill-first.md) and fire a detached/throttled incremental reindex so the index self-refreshes (auto_reindex.py). UserPromptSubmit: inject the cheap per-turn gate trigger + semantic top-k candidates (enforcer) and log turns/manual use (ledger). PostToolUse: log Claude's auto skill / semantic-search invocations. Fail-silent, additive-only. No post-turn gate — governance is in-generation, caveman-style.
